title: Buster's TD
summary: An Unreal Engine tower defense game used to explore gameplay systems, worldbuilding, and long-form game development.
description: Buster's TD is Phil's game-development city. It represents learning and shipping in Unreal Engine, testing tower-defense mechanics, and building gameplay ideas in a form that is both technical and creative.
The project is linked publicly through its Steam page and Robot Future references, even though its development surface is not centered on a public GitHub repo.

media.alt: A screenshot of the Buster's TD Steam page.
media.caption: The public Steam presence for Phil's Unreal Engine tower defense project.

media.alt: A fortified frontier city representing Buster's TD.
media.caption: A frontier capital for Unreal Engine, gameplay loops, and player-facing systems.

greatWorks.title: Siege Engine
greatWorks.summary: A long-running Unreal Engine build focused on gameplay systems, iteration, and worldbuilding.

highlights: Built as a hands-on Unreal Engine learning and production project.
Uses tower defense as a framework for gameplay iteration.
Connects technical implementation with worldbuilding and player experience.
productionQueue: Keep iterating on gameplay balance and progression loops.
Expand presentation and world cohesion around the core defense systems.
Document more of the build process publicly.
